title: Implementation Plan
content:
We develop a comprehensive project execution strategy, focusing on:

- Precise cost estimation
- Contractor selection
- Detailed project management

**Aims and Purposes:**

- Establish definitive project costs
- Define technical execution modalities
- Select qualified implementation partners
- Ensure smooth project transition from design to reality

**Drawings and Documents Provided:**

- Detailed cost documentation:
  - Comprehensive bill of quantities
  - Itemised cost breakdown
- Tender Specification Package: Contractual framework document, Comprehensive work description, Performance expectations
- Contractor Selection Support: Evaluation criteria, Recommendation process, Due diligence documentation, Project Implementation Timeline
